parameters.query:
select * from mes.joborder j 
where j.joborder_id ='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.joborderid }}'

workflowId.cachedResultName: 1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口

parameters.query:
select pm.product_model_name from mes.joborder j 
join mes.product_info pi2 on j.product_id = pi2.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id
where j.joborder_id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.joborderid }}

SELECT *
FROM YFConsumer.dbo.consm_baselinegenerate
WHERE ProductName = '{{ $json.query.ProductName }}'
  AND ProductModel = '{{ $json.query.ProductModel }}'
  AND ProductPhase = '{{ $json.query.ProductPhase }}'
  AND CAST(BeginSeries AS INT) <={{ $json.query.BeginSeries }}   -- 转为数字
  AND CAST(EndSeries AS INT) >={{ $json.query.EndSeries }} ;   -- 转为数字

nodes.name: 查询是否存在过相同的retroid_generate
查询是否存在重复区间
判断是否存在重复区间

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    jo.joborder_id,
    COUNT(r.retroid_id) AS retroid_count,
    jo.product_quantity
FROM 
    mes.joborder jo
LEFT JOIN 
    mes.retroid r ON jo.joborder_id = r.joborder_id AND r.status <> 3
WHERE 
    jo.joborder_id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.query.joborderid }}
GROUP BY 
    jo.joborder_id, jo.product_quantity;
